from typing import Iterator, Union
from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass
class ErrorEvent:
    level: str
    message: str
    code: int


@dataclass
class MetricEvent:
    name: str
    value: float


@dataclass
class TraceEvent:
    trace_id: str


LogEvent = Union[ErrorEvent, MetricEvent, TraceEvent]


def iter_events(log_path: str) -> Iterator[LogEvent]:
    with open(log_path) as f:
        for line in f:
            parts = line.strip().split("\t")
            if parts[0] == "ERROR":
                yield ErrorEvent(level="error", message=parts[1], code=int(parts[2]))
            elif parts[0] == "METRIC":
                yield MetricEvent(name=parts[1], value=float(parts[2]))
            elif parts[0] == "TRACE":
                yield TraceEvent(trace_id=parts[1])
